scenarios.name: Missing Stock Reconciliation
scenarios.input: Check Product prod_1234. Website says 0 stock but it should be sellable.
scenarios.ground_truth: Website inventory reconciled with Inventory Service. Sync triggered successfully.

scenarios.name: Stuck Sync (SQS Backlog)
scenarios.input: Project 1029 sync is taking too long. Check the queue.
scenarios.ground_truth: Identified SQS backlog. Triggered manual sync for style 1029 as per the troubleshooting guide.

scenarios.name: Fatal Sync Error (DLQ)
scenarios.input: Product 8899 threw an error in the logs. Investigate and fix.
scenarios.ground_truth: Found DLQ message ERR_INV_404. Resolved by triggering a full PIM-to-Web sync.
